data.title: Add smoke test procedure and regression detection demo to SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md
data.description:
Add a smoke test section and regression detection demonstration to the eval convention guide.

## Implementation
- File: plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md (modify — created by S1 T4)
- Add a "Smoke Test" section with step-by-step procedure:
  1. Run a single eval: run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/
  2. Verify it passes (exit 0)
  3. Introduce an intentional regression (e.g., modify the skill to always return CLEAR regardless of input)
  4. Re-run the eval: run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/
  5. Verify it fails (exit non-zero) — demonstrating regression detection
  6. Revert the change
- Add a "Regression Detection" section explaining:
  - How llm-rubric assertions catch behavioral regressions
  - Why eval configs should test both positive and negative cases
  - How daily CI (S2) catches regressions automatically

## Test Exemption
test-exempt: documentation-only change. (1) no conditional logic, (2) test would only assert doc content exists, (3) purely documentation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md contains smoke test section
  Verify: grep -qi 'smoke test' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md
- [ ] Guide contains regression detection section
  Verify: grep -qi 'regression' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md
- [ ] Guide contains step-by-step procedure (at least 4 numbered steps)
  Verify: grep -cE '^\s*[0-9]+\.' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md (modify)
